---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---


```{r, warnings=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(marginaleffects)
library(fixest)
library(gam)
library(splines)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(gridExtra)
library(useful)
library(purrr)
library(patchwork)
library(rms)
library(tidycensus)
library(tigris)
library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(did)
library(haven)
library(bea.R)
library(lpdid)
library(DIDmultiplegtDYN)
library(ggpattern)
library(countrycode)
library(stringr)
library(ggpattern)
library(scales)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggpubr)
library(splp)
library(MatchIt)
library(cobalt)

options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)
setFixest_notes(FALSE)
source("../emileRegs.R")
```





# Data  

```{r}
myblue  = "#1f78b4"   # blue
myred  = "#e31a1c"
myyellow = "orange"  # orange
myblack = "black"  # light blue
mygreen = "forestgreen"  # green
```



```{r}
# Also load full panel for comparison
pwt  <- read_stata("../raw_data/pwt_clean.dta")
tcs  <- read_stata("../raw_data/ibtracs_clean.dta")
data_full <- pwt %>% left_join(tcs, by = c("year", "countrycode"))

knot_to_ms <- 0.514444
data <- data_full %>%
  mutate(
    maxwind  = replace_na(max_ann_wind_i_nob, 0) * knot_to_ms,
    energy  = replace_na(sum_ann_energy_i_nob, 0),
    nlands  = replace_na(sum_a_lands_nob, 0),
    loggdp   = ln_real_gdp_usd_pc,
    gdp_diff = growth_real_gdp_usd_pc,
    year2    = year^2,
    period   = ifelse(year <= 1990, "Pre-1990", "Post-1990")
  ) %>%
  filter(year >= 1969) %>%
  mutate(
    maxwind_p95 = quantile(maxwind[year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    maxwind_95 = as.integer(maxwind_p95 > 0 & maxwind >= maxwind_p95),
    maxwind_p99 = quantile(maxwind[year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.99, na.rm = TRUE),
    maxwind_99 = as.integer(maxwind_p99 > 0 & maxwind >= maxwind_p99),
    cat1_plus = as.integer(maxwind >= 32.7),  # Cat 1+ threshold in m/s
    cat2_plus = as.integer(maxwind >= 49.4),  # Cat 2+ threshold in m/s
    cat3_plus = as.integer(maxwind >= 70.0),   # Cat 3+ threshold in m/s
    energy_p95  = quantile(energy[year >= 1970 & year <= 2014],  0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    nlands_p95  = quantile(nlands[year >= 1970 & year <= 2014],  0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    energy_95  = as.integer(energy_p95  > 0 & energy  >= energy_p95),
    nlands_95  = as.integer(nlands_p95  > 0 & nlands  >= nlands_p95),
    energy_p99 = quantile(energy[year >= 1970 & year <= 2014],  0.99, na.rm = TRUE),
    nlands_p99 = quantile(nlands[year >= 1970 & year <= 2014],  0.99, na.rm = TRUE),
    energy_99  = as.integer(energy_p99  > 0 & energy >= energy_p99),
    nlands_99  = as.integer(nlands_p99  > 0 & nlands  >= nlands_p99),
    region = countrycode(countrycode, "iso3c", "region"),
    region = ifelse(is.na(region), "Other", region),
    continent = countrycode(countrycode, "iso3c", "continent"),
    continent = ifelse(is.na(continent), "Other", continent)
  )

data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    maxwind_sd = maxwind / sd(maxwind[maxwind > 0], na.rm = TRUE),
    energy_sd  = energy  / sd(energy[energy > 0],   na.rm = TRUE),
    nlands_sd  = nlands  / sd(nlands[nlands > 0],   na.rm = TRUE)
  )



```






# Maps

```{r}
data_tc_filtered <- data %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(max(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE) > 0 | max(nlands, na.rm = TRUE) > 0) %>%
  ungroup()


ggplot(
  ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
    left_join(
      data_tc_filtered %>%
        group_by(countrycode) %>%
        summarise(mean_maxwind = mean(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE)),
      by = c("adm0_a3" = "countrycode")
    ) %>% #remove antarctica
    filter(name != "Antarctica")
) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = mean_maxwind), color = "white", size = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_distiller(
    palette = "YlOrRd",
    direction = 1,
    na.value = "grey90",
    name = " Max Wind Speed (m/s)"
  ) +
  coord_sf(crs = "+proj=robin") +
  theme_void() +
      theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )

ggsave("figures/map_maxwind.png", width = 8, height = 5)



ggplot(
  ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
    left_join(
      data_tc %>%
        group_by(countrycode) %>%
        summarise(gdp = mean(loggdp, na.rm = TRUE)),
      by = c("iso_a3" = "countrycode")
    )%>% #remove antarctica
    filter(name != "Antarctica")
) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = gdp), color = "white", size = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c("darkblue", RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "Spectral")),
    values = scales::rescale(
      c(
        min(data_tc$gdp, na.rm = TRUE),
        max(data_tc$gdp, na.rm = TRUE)
      )
    ),
       #labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 0.1), # <-- display as %
    na.value = "grey90",
    name = "log GDP pc"
  ) +
  #robinson proj
  coord_sf(crs = "+proj=robin") +
  theme_void() +
      theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )

ggsave("figures/map_gdp.png", width = 8, height = 5)


```

# Time Series

```{r}
# ── shared theme ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
base_theme <- theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    strip.background   = element_blank(),
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title         = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey93", linewidth = 0.4),
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey40"),
    legend.background  = element_blank(),
    legend.key         = element_blank()
  )

col_main   <- "#2b6cb0"   # steel blue
col_light  <- "#90cdf4"
col_pre    <- "#4a90d9"
col_post   <- "#c0392b"
col_p95    <- "#e67e22"
col_p99    <- "#8e44ad"

# ── panel-level summary ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# P2 & P4: annual summaries
annual <- data %>%
  filter(year >= 1970, year <= 2014) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_wind  = mean(maxwind[maxwind > 0], na.rm = TRUE),
    max_wind  = max(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_exposed = sum(maxwind > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(top5 = rank(-max_wind) <= 5)

# P4: extreme event counts per year
extreme <- data %>%
  filter(year >= 1970, year <= 2014) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    n_p95  = sum(maxwind_95, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_cat1 = sum(cat1_plus,  na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(n_p95, n_cat1),
               names_to = "threshold", values_to = "n_events") %>%
  mutate(threshold = recode(threshold,
                            n_p95  = "p95 (binary)",
                            n_cat1 = "Cat 1+ (\u226533 m/s)"))

# ── P1: lollipop — top 15 countries by average max wind ─────────────────────
top_countries <- data %>%
  filter(year >= 1970, year <= 2014, maxwind > 0) %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  summarise(avg_maxwind = mean(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  slice_max(avg_maxwind, n = 15) %>%
  mutate(countrycode = fct_reorder(countrycode, avg_maxwind))

p1 <- ggplot(top_countries, aes(x = avg_maxwind, y = countrycode)) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = avg_maxwind,
                   y = countrycode, yend = countrycode),
               color = "firebrick", linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = "firebrick") +
  labs(
    title    = "A  Countries with highest average max wind speed",
    subtitle = "Top 15 countries, mean over exposed years 1970\u20132014",
    x        = "Avg max wind (m/s)",
    y        = NULL
  ) +
  base_theme

# ── P2: max wind per year as bar chart ──────────────────────────────────────
p2 <- ggplot(annual, aes(x = year, y = max_wind, fill = top5)) +
  geom_col(alpha = 0.85, width = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(aes(x = year, y = max_wind), method = "lm", se = FALSE,
              color = col_post, linewidth = 1.1, linetype = "dashed",
              inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(
    data = ~ filter(.x, top5),
    aes(label = year, y = max_wind),
    color = "#e63946", fontface = "bold", size = 3.2,
    vjust = -0.5, hjust = 0.5
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("FALSE" = col_main, "TRUE" = "#e63946"),
                    guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(1970, 2014, 8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.08))) +
  labs(
    title    = "B  Peak max wind speed per year",
    subtitle = "Dashed line = linear trend; red = top 5 years",
    x        = "Year",
    y        = "Max wind speed (m/s)"
  ) +
  base_theme

# ── P3: Kernel density of max wind, pre vs post 1990 ────────────────────────
kde_data <- data %>%
  filter(year >= 1970, year <= 2014, maxwind > 0) %>%
  mutate(period = factor(period, levels = c("Pre-1990", "Post-1990")))

p3 <- ggplot(kde_data, aes(x = maxwind, color = period, fill = period)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.18, linewidth = 1.2, bw = "nrd0") +
  geom_vline(
    data = kde_data %>%
      group_by(period) %>%
      summarise(med = median(maxwind), .groups = "drop"),
    aes(xintercept = med, color = period),
    linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Pre-1990"  = col_pre,
                                "Post-1990" = col_post),
                     name = NULL) +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = c("Pre-1990"  = col_pre,
                                "Post-1990" = col_post),
                    name = NULL) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    title    = "C  Distribution of max wind speed: Pre- vs Post-1990",
    subtitle = "Kernel density; dashed lines = medians; exposed country-years only",
    x        = "Max wind speed (m/s)",
    y        = "Density"
  ) +
  base_theme +
  theme(legend.position = c(0.78, 0.80))

# ── P4: trend in extreme events per year ────────────────────────────────────
p4 <- ggplot(extreme, aes(x = year, y = n_events,
                           color = threshold, fill = threshold)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.7, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_point(size = 1.6, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1.1, alpha = 0.15) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("p95 (binary)"    = col_p95,
                                "Cat 1+ (\u226533 m/s)" = col_p99),
                     name = NULL) +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = c("p95 (binary)"    = col_p95,
                                "Cat 1+ (\u226533 m/s)" = col_p99),
                    name = NULL) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(1970, 2014, 8)) +
  labs(
    title    = "D  Extreme TC events per year",
    subtitle = "Linear trends by threshold",
    x        = "Year",
    y        = "# country-years above threshold"
  ) +
  base_theme +
  theme(legend.position = c(0.22, 0.88))

# ── Combine with patchwork ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
wind_descriptives <- (p1 + p2) / (p3 + p4) +
  plot_annotation(
    title   = "Tropical Cyclone Climatology, 1970\u20132014",
    caption = "Source: IBTrACS + PWT. Max wind in m/s. p95/p99 thresholds computed over 1970\u20132014.",
    theme   = theme(
      plot.title   = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      plot.caption = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey50")
    )
  )

ggsave("figures/wind_descriptives.png",
       wind_descriptives, width = 12, height = 9, dpi = 300)

wind_descriptives
```
